colm_v2_backport.recommended_use: Mention as an ICLR live-gate preflight that does not yet support broad Sparse Resonance Packets.

iclr_effect.promoted: source-causal tokenwise preflight remains the right question
iclr_effect.weakened: the current token-pooled source-to-soft-prefix receiver on Qwen3
iclr_effect.ruled_out: promoting the n8 CPU token-pool residual soft-prefix smoke as positive evidence

mps_n32_attempt.command_summary: run_source_private_arc_openbookqa_soft_prefix_preflight.py with row_limit=32, fixed_fit_rows=16, hf_choice_token_hidden_pool_residual, Qwen2.5-0.5B source, Qwen3-0.6B target on MPS
mps_n32_attempt.failure_kind: MPSGraph attention shape inference failure during prefix inputs_embeds target scoring
mps_n32_attempt.failure_excerpt: LLVM ERROR: Failed to infer result type(s): "mps.matmul"(...) : (tensor<1x16x90x128xf32>, tensor<1x8x128x90xf32>) -> ( ??? )
mps_n32_attempt.interpretation: This is a Mac/MPS execution blocker, not a scientific pass/fail. The n32 gate needs CPU execution, a different target/MPS attention path, or a non-prefix receiver.

cpu_n8_smoke.interpretation: The token-pooled soft-prefix receiver did not recover source-causal signal on this tiny CPU smoke; source-index/score controls remained much stronger.

next_exact_gate.name: arc_tokenwise_repair_readout_preflight
next_exact_gate.reason: The tokenwise source features may still contain repair signal, but the current soft-prefix receiver is unstable and MPS-blocked. Test source-causal repair readout before another target-prefix training loop.
next_exact_gate.pass_bar: A lightweight receiver using tokenwise source features improves over target-only, source-index/rank/score, same-byte text, wrong-row, same-source-choice wrong-row, candidate-roll, and target-derived controls with positive paired CI.
next_exact_gate.fallback: Run the full n32 CPU version only if the lightweight repair readout shows signal.
